comments.comment: This value is based on the number of rounds fired for training purposes. Variations are directly related to the tempo of training.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: No Lead acid vehicle batteries included this year as none were altered. All batteries are shipped in with electrolyte and shipped for recycling intact. Lead acis vehicle batteries no longer qualify for NPRI.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Lead acid batteries are no altered during use, and are now excluded from the NPRI. Any expected recycling will occur from the removal of spent ammunition from firing ranges.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Use of mercury is now restricted to scientific activities, and the reduction is use for thermostats and controls ahs lead to a significant decrease in mercury used and disposed of.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: An Energy Performance Contract re-lamping project resulted in significat recycling is 2007. The project was mostly completed by January 1 2008.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Last year releases included a significant re-lamping program which was mostly completed prior to January 1 2008.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Lead acid batteries are received charged with electrolyte and shipped exhausted and intact. The lead waste in this report was from the removal of lead contaminated paint during a building renovation.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: This recycled lead waste was from a laboratory clean up at the Royal Military College of Canada, a University on site. Such wastes are from the cessation of experiments and amounts are difficult to predict.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Amounts of laboratory waste Mercury is variable and difficult to predict.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The majority of these releases occured during materials movement of sand from a firing range.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: This lead is a waste product, and amounts are quite variable between years.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: A significant increase in range training for overseas missions has produced an increase in the number of rounds being used.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: A laboratory clean-up yielded a significant increase in waste mercury.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Significant laboratory waste was found during a clean-up of the Royal Military College Chemistry store rooms.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The mercury sent for recycling resulted from a major laboratory clean-up at the Royal Military College of Canada.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The majority of last tears emissions were based on the movement of range soils. This years emissions are attributable only to natural gas combustion.
